name: Adv. Rajesh Mehta
quote: An indispensable resource for every corporate lawyer. The NCLT practice section is particularly well‑written.

name: Priya Sharma
quote: Clear, practical, and up‑to‑date. I recommend it to all CA/CS students.

name: Vikram Rao
quote: Finally, a book that explains complex concepts simply. Excellent companion for professionals.

name: Dr. Anjali Desai
quote: The commentary on IBC is superb. It has become my go‑to reference for teaching.
